title: Alzheimer's patients may wait years to get treated with new drugs, putting them at risk of more severe disease
text: Patients could face wait times ranging from 18 months to four years or more to get diagnosed and then treated for Alzheimer's disease.

title: The 3 Most Promising Biotech Innovations in 2023 and the Stocks to Buy
text: The biotech sector is up 4.76% so far in 2023. This continues the nice run that biotech stocks had in 2022.

title: FDA Grants Accelerated Approval for QALSODY™ (tofersen) for SOD1-ALS, a Major Scientific Advancement as the First Treatment to Target a Genetic Cause of ALS
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) announced today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved QALSODY™ (tofersen) 100 mg/15mL injection for the treatment of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) in adults who have a mutation in the superoxide dismutase 1 (SOD1) gene. This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on reduction in plasma neurofilament light chain (NfL) observed in patients treated with QALSODY. Continued approval for this indication may be contingent upon verification of clinical benefit in confirmatory trial(s).1 The ongoing Phase 3 ATLAS study of tofersen in people with presymptomatic SOD1-ALS will serve as the confirmatory trial.1

title: FDA grants accelerated approval to Biogen's treatment for rare form of ALS
text: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration said Tuesday it has granted accelerated approval to Biogen Inc.'s BIIB torferson, a treatment for a rare form of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS. The accelerated approval program is used to OK drugs for serious conditions with an unmet medical need, where a drug is shown to have an effect on an endpoint that is reasonably likely to predict a clinical benefit to patients.

title: Biogen isn't concerned about competing with Eli Lilly in the Alzheimer's drug space, CEO says
text: Biogen CEO Christopher Viehbacher said during an earnings call that Eli Lilly needs to consider maintenance doses its Alzheimer's treatment donanemab.

title: FDA grants accelerated approval for Biogen ALS drug that treats rare form of the disease
text: The FDA's approval requires Biogen to further study its ALS drug tofersen to further verify its clinical benefits.

title: Biogen (BIIB) Beats on Q1 Earnings, Ends Some Research Programs
text: Biogen (BIIB) beats first-quarter estimates for earnings and sales. It maintains its 2023 guidance.

title: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.25 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.62 per share a year ago.

title: Alzheimer's Drugs Still Aren't Biogen's Saving Grace — But The Company Is Hopeful
text: Biogen stock fell early Tuesday as the company reiterated its outlook for declining sales despite its new Alzheimer's treatment. The post Alzheimer's Drugs Still Aren't Biogen's Saving Grace — But The Company Is Hopeful appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Biogen tops estimates as revenue slides 3% from a year ago
text: Biogen Inc. BIIB said Tuesday it had net income of $387.9 million, or $2.67 a share, for the first quarter, up from $303.8 million, or $2.06 a share, in the year-earlier period. Adjusted per-share earnings came to $3.40, ahead of the $3.28 FactSet consensus.

title: Better Big Biotech Buy: Biogen vs. Vertex
text: Biogen and Vertex are both waiting on big regulatory decisions for potential products. The companies each bring in billions of dollars in revenue every year.

title: Biogen (BIIB) to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: Biogen's (BIIB) sales in the first quarter are likely to have been hurt by lower sales of multiple sclerosis drugs, while sales of Spinraza are likely to have improved.

title: Earnings Preview: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Is Biogen Stock a Buy Now?
text: Biogen could be close to a game-changing approval for an Alzheimer's medicine. This therapy would help significantly improve the biotech's financial results.

title: Bulls Blast Biotech Stock Before Earnings
text: Biogen Inc (NASDAQ:BIIB) is buzzing today, after Piper Sandler and Wedbush praised the drugmaker ahead of the company's first-quarter earnings report -- due out before the market's open on Tuesday, April 25.

title: Alzheimer's patients retain the benefits of Leqembi even when they stop the drug, Eisai says
text: Alzheimer's patients who take Leqembi retain the benefits of the treatment even when they stop taking it, new research by Eisai and Biogen shows.

title: U.S. Wide-Moat Stocks On Sale - The April 2023 Heat Map
text: Our 3-step process focuses on wide-moat stocks (as per Morningstar's rating). We are only interested in those targets that are attractively valued in historical comparison.

title: Biogen Appoints Adam Keeney as Head of Corporate Development
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 04, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) today announced the appointment of Adam Keeney, Ph.D., as Executive Vice President, Head of Corporate Development effective 17 April 2023. Dr. Keeney will be a member of Biogen's Executive Committee reporting to Christopher A. Viehbacher, President and Chief Executive Officer.
